title: Inspector Delta Full Diff
description: Studio UI for **Inspector Delta Full Diff**: unified diff of canonical base vs merged result from `PreviewSpec`, honoring **draft** overrides when the editor is dirty.
context: Studio UI for **Inspector Delta Full Diff**: unified diff of canonical base vs merged result from `PreviewSpec`, honoring **draft** overrides when the editor is dirty.

rules.requirement: diff uses same preview source as Preview tab
rules: Diff MUST use `previewHook.data.base` and `previewHook.data.merged` from the same preview load as Preview (including `previewChangeDraft` when dirty).

rules.requirement: diff tab only for change deltas
rules:
The Diff tab MUST appear only when `showsInspectorDiffTab(filename)` is true (change-directory paths under `deltas/` with spec-preview merge). It MUST NOT render as a disabled control.

The Diff tab MUST NOT appear for workspace **spec** artifacts, **archived** change artifacts, change `specs/` (new spec) paths, or non-preview artifacts (e.g. `proposal.md`).
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

scenarios.requirement: diff uses same preview source as Preview tab
scenarios.name: Dirty diff shows base vs draft merge
given: dirty delta artifact and preview hook loaded with overrides
then: diff compares base to merged from draft preview
AND not from saved-on-disk merge only

scenarios.requirement: diff tab only for change deltas
scenarios.name: Proposal has no Diff tab
given: proposal.md selected on an active change
then: Diff tab is not present in the strip

scenarios.requirement: diff tab only for change deltas
scenarios.name: Workspace spec has no Diff tab
given: a canonical workspace spec artifact is open

scenarios.requirement: diff tab only for change deltas
scenarios.name: Archived change artifact has no Diff tab
given: an archived change artifact is open

scenarios.requirement: diff tab only for change deltas
scenarios.name: New spec under specs/ in change has no Diff tab
then: AND Preview may still use spec-preview merge

scenarios.requirement: diff tab only for change deltas
scenarios.name: Delta artifact shows Diff tab
then: Diff tab is present and selectable

scenarios.name: view uses SpecdDataPort hooks only — primary path
when: Components MUST consume data through SpecdDataPort hooks and
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: view uses SpecdDataPort hooks only — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
